system.Text:
__When your expedition comes to an end__, roll the challenge dice and compare to your progress.

On a __strong hit__, you reach your destination. Mark a reward on your discoveries legacy track per expedition's rank: troublesome=1 tick; dangerous=2 ticks; formidable=1 box; extreme=2 boxes; epic=3 boxes. Any allies who shared this expedition also mark the reward.

On a __weak hit__, as above, but you face an unforeseen hazard or complication. Make the legacy reward one rank lower (none for a troublesome expedition), and envision what you encounter.

On a __miss__, your destination is lost to you, or you come to understand the true nature or cost of the expedition. Envision what happens and choose one.

  * Abandon the expedition: Envision the cost of this setback and @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.78baa51694fe37c5]{Pay the Price}.
  * Return to the expedition: Roll both challenge dice, take the lowest value, and clear that number of progress boxes. Then, raise the expedition's rank by one (if not already epic).
